# of iMCU rows to be input to coefficient or

description: Color transform code from Adobe marker

name: MCU_rows_in_scan
description: # of MCU rows in the image

description: Kx values for AC arith-coding tables

name: arith_dc_L
description: L values for DC arith-coding tables

name: arith_dc_U
description: U values for DC arith-coding tables

name: coef_bits
description: -1 or current Al value for each coef

name: colormap
description:
The color map as a 2-D pixel array
                                   If data_precision is 12, then this is
                                   actually a J12SAMPARRAY, so callers must
                                   type-cast it in order to read/write 12-bit
                                   samples from/to the array.

name: comps_in_scan
description: # of JPEG components in this scan

name: data_precision
description: bits of precision in image data

name: density_unit
description: JFIF code for pixel size units

name: desired_number_of_colors
description: max # colors to use in created colormap

name: dither_mode
description: type of color dithering to use

name: enable_external_quant
description: enable future use of external colormap

name: input_scan_number
description: Number of SOS markers seen so far

name: marker_list
description: Head of list of saved markers

name: num_components
description: # of color components in JPEG image

name: progressive_mode
description: TRUE if SOFn specifies progressive mode

name: rec_outbuf_height
description: min recommended height of scanline buffer

name: restart_interval
description: MCUs per restart interval, or 0 for no restart

name: sample_range_limit
description:
table for fast range-limiting
                                   If data_precision is 9 to 12, then this is
                                   actually a J12SAMPLE pointer, and if
                                   data_precision is 13 to 16, then this is
                                   actually a J16SAMPLE pointer, so callers
                                   must type-cast it in order to read samples
                                   from the array.

name: saw_Adobe_marker
description: TRUE iff an Adobe APP14 marker was found

name: saw_JFIF_marker
description: TRUE iff a JFIF APP0 marker was found

name: scale_denom
description: fraction by which to scale image

name: scale_num
description: fraction by which to scale image
